tracks.rawText: 2:10Bulletproof Heartv5The song opens with a laid-back bass groove and crisp ride cymbal, laying a cool jazz foundation, Punchy horns, muted trumpet, and brushed snare embody swing noir and spy jazz flavors, The arrangement fuses retro lounge funk with minimal big band textures, adding cascading vibraphone and staccato guitar riffs for a cinematic 60s crime feel, Sections alternate between tension-building, suspenseful breaks and smooth, sultry main themes, weaving a stylish, cinematic heist-jazz tapestry, modern Ultra-processed synthetic vocals, heavily autotuned and vocoded, futuristic and glossy, extreme vocal effects, layered harmonies, robotic and digital texture, studio-polished, cinematic production, wide stereo, lush reverb and delay, modern electronic vocal sound design house, greek trapPublishRemix
